calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of Trial De Novo.

Dept. 306; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:41:07 a.m. and concluding at 11:10:49 a.m.

Appellant/ Defendant Albert Wong appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.
Respondent/ Plaintiff Kim Hue Hua appearing in pro per and is placed under oath. Respondent/ Plaintiff is assisted by a Cantonese Language Interpreter Winnie Chan; Certification No. 785540.

Appellant/ Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Copy of Lease Agreement
Exhibit B - 5 Pages of Photographs and/or Screenshots
Exhibit C - 3 Pages of Screenshots of Text Messages
Exhibit D - Multiple Photographs of Unit dated Jul-17-2021 (before photos)
Exhibit E - Receipts
Exhibit F - Check for $3,500.00
Exhibit G - Photographs of Carpet
Exhibit H - Photographs of text messages with handwritten notes, mini-blinds, window, wall, and damage to unit

Exhibit I - Plumbing Receipt
Exhibit J - 4 Page Document of Receipts

Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Letter to Albert Wong dated Apr-10-2023
Exhibit 2 - Housing Authority of the Cify and County of San Francisco - Verification of Key Return

Exhibit 3 - Housing Authority of the Cify and County of San Francisco - Notice of Intent to Move

Exhibit 4 - Invoice from Eugene, the Handyman for Carpet Cleaning
Exhibit 5 - Home Depot Receipt for $7.09

The matter is submitted.
Court finds that $1,000.00 shall be deducted from Plaintiff's deposit. Court determines there to be a fair and reasaonable representation that goes beyond normal wear and tear.

Respondent/Plaintiff is awarded $2,000.00.
Appellant/Defendant shall pay Respondent/Plaintiff the sum of $2,000.00 by check via U.S. Mail by Aug-23-2023.
Judgment entered.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Continued To Aug-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Judgment Entered
